You will be using a lot of them since endgame requires a lot of units (19 at least)

Is this a good team? Im currently doing chapter 3
im late but how does the poison team work?
ive never done a team like that b4
Apply poison to enemies , play defensive cards to survive, watch them die
no like which char does what exactly
im sorta winging it spamming random cards and its working so far ig

You usually take it into wave 3 only because without xu poison will _really_ struggle to clear mobs effectively. The ramp up is too slow. Gdoll poison comp is mostly playing gdoll 3 cost over and over, rousing gdoll then the rest of the team, and trying your best not to die. You want to OE gdoll until you get the end, then just regular exalt her for the most part. After you get the end her 3 cost will really start applying a lot of poison.

Faint is there to give you DR and let you use caro furnace to try and bounce back after hitting DR. She also has weakness. Nymph is there to help proc poison and can also apply a little. Her keyflare also helps because this is a team that wants to rouse a lot. Lily at e0 isn't going to be super effective at either keeping you alive or proccing poison compared to e3, but she is probably your best option in that slot.
Gdoll and caecus is an interesting mix, I like it. Nymph should be solid, and nautila...might be someone you *could* swap out if you wanted to? But idk to what, maybe Lily or Karin or smth

I'm stuggling with Arachne's covenant, because I do not use her the way most do, probably.
To me, Arachne is like doing 66% of the damage of the team, she's most a DPS than a support.

In that situation, I'm unsure if RM is still more important than damage Amplification on the covenant.
Also, the covenant itself... I'm not sure Dream of Medicine will be suitable, because it copies also 3 cards I almost never use on her (strike, defense and the 3 cost). Arachne in my team is played for Eternal Loom and her passives

So... what alternative can I try? Which covenant, which stats?
thanks, should i get xu for this poison build idea?
so far from my previous post i have a kathi, pollux, vortice carry team and now a WIP team

Yes. If you enjoy/want to play poison teams xu is a really important unit. Even at e0. Not strictly required though for w3a5 if you already have gdoll at OE. Xu will passively help your fixed poison appliers like nymph out a lot. If you want to play her in the w3 gdoll team she will be extremely good at proccing poison with her exalt and 3 cost (usually gets discounted to 0 after rouse).
The team is just a poison and counter focus so I thought a good spread of both would work, but I have no idea if this holds up further into the story
